name: Camp Chilli
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine all the ingredients.
2. Stir to mix until well combined.
3. Gradually add water, stirring constantly until the mixture is smooth and fully incorporated.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat.
5. Reduce the heat to low and let it gently simmer for 30-45 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the desired consistency is reached.
6. Turn off the heat and serve hot.
